clusters.title: Man dies after shark attack off Western Australia coast near Albany
clusters.neutral_headline: Man dies after shark attack off Western Australia coast near Albany
bullet_summary: The state’s police force confirmed on Saturday afternoon that the 35-year-old man had died, after being treated by paramedics at the scene for more than two hours
Reported by Guardian Australia, ABC News Australia

items.title: Man dies after shark attack off Western Australia coast near Albany
items.standfirst: Government department says man was in the water around Michaelmas Island, near Albany, when he was bitten by a suspected 4.5-metre sharkGet our breaking news email, free app or daily news podcastA male diver aged in his 30s has died after being bitten by a shark in Western Australia.The state’s police force confirmed on Saturday afternoon that the 35-year-old man had died, after being treated by paramedics at the scene for more than two hours. items.content: A male diver has died after an attack by a suspected 4.5-metre shark near Michaelmas Island, off WA's Albany coast, on Saturday morning.
